series_metadata.series_description: Materials relating to Ohio Post-Secondary Telecommunications Council meetings and activities, Central Educational Network activities, PTV-3 activities, and other service functions provided to institutions of higher education in telecourse matters. May contain executed contracts.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: a) Retain in office files for 5 years; review for possible transfer to State Archives; destroy those not transferred. b) Retain contracts for 5 years after expiration date of rights; review for possible transfer to State Archives; destroy those not transferred., Paper: Archives
